description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script printing the Python version, installing python3-dev via apt, and building the package with python setup.py build, and sets LANG and LC_ALL to C.UTF-8. Define a hidden .tox template job using the python:latest image that installs tox with pip in its before_script and executes tox with TOXENV=py. Add a black job that extends .tox, sets TOXENV=black, and is allowed to fail; add flake8 and isort jobs that also extend .tox with TOXENV=flake8 and TOXENV=isort respectively; add a mypy job extending .tox, setting TOXENV=mypy and allowing failure. Add a codespell job that uses the debian:stable image, runs apt update and installs codespell, then runs codespell --skip "*.json,*.xml,*.ini,*.mbx" *. Finally, add a test job extending .tox that runs in parallel across three Python images (python:3.9, python:3.11, python:3.13) by setting its image to $IMAGE. All jobs run in the default test stage.
